entry.title: you are all dense 😰 mutual abuse is not a thing. for a relation to be abusiv there needs to be a power imbalance + self defense is not abuse #coquettecore #digitaldiary #femmelesbians #abuseawareness #mentalhealthawareness #recoverytok
entry.content: you are all dense 😰 mutual abuse is not a thing. for a relation to be abusiv there needs to be a power imbalance + self defense is not abuse #coquettecore #digitaldiary #femmelesbians #abuseawareness #mentalhealthawareness #recoverytok
